# Auto-generated for SILENT HILL 2 (AppID 2124490)
# User's setup: Ubuntu + GNOME Wayland + AMD RX 6600 + Steam + custom Protons
# Goal: Max graphics quality + best stability/performance/latency on Linux

# Recommended - copy to Steam game Properties > Launch Options
gamescope -e -- gamemoderun %command%

# Enhanced version (recommended for most games on this rig):
# gamescope -e -- gamemoderun PROTON_ENABLE_WAYLAND=1 %command%

# Notes:
# - gamescope -e gives excellent results on Wayland (no tearing, good input).
# - gamemoderun for better scheduling (already installed).
# - Add game-specific flags after research (e.g. RADV_DEBUG=..., VKD3D_CONFIG=...).
# - For DX12 heavy games on AMD, often need RADV_DEBUG=nomeshshader or similar.
# - Always force a good Proton (GE Latest or CachyOS) in Compatibility.

# To use the enhanced one, replace the line above with the commented version and test.
